title: Actor Resolver Git
description: Provides actor identity resolution using the local Git configuration.
context: Provides actor identity resolution using the local Git configuration.

rules:
The Git actor provider MUST implement the `AutoDetectActorProvider` interface.

- **`name`**: MUST be `"git"`.
The provider MUST detect Git presence by looking for a `.git` directory in the `cwd` or its parents.

The resulting resolver MUST retrieve identity from Git config:

- `name`: `git config user.name`
- `email`: `git config user.email`
- `provider`: MUST be set to `"git"`.

scenarios.name: Identity from config
then: it returns an object with email "dev@example.com"
